name: Exterran Holdings, Inc.
description: Exterran Holdings, Inc. was a global market leader in full-service natural gas compression and a premier provider of services and equipment for oil and gas production, processing, treating, and transportation. The company provided contract operations, services, and equipment to customers worldwide, including major, national, and independent oil and gas companies. In 2015, Exterran Holdings completed a spin-off of its international services and global fabrication businesses into a new publicly traded company called Exterran Corporation, while the remaining U.S. contract operations business was renamed Archrock, Inc.
